title: Collector's Reap
description: Farmer's Delight addon with foods scavenged from the wild.
body:
Collector's Reap is an addon for Farmer's Delight with foods scavenged from the wild. Pomegranates are found on bushes in the Nether in the Warped Forest biome. Grow them in the Nether or pollinate them with a Bee in the Overworld. Nylium or Rich Soul Soil could speed things up.
Pomegranate Foods Most foods in this category provide the Volatility effect, an offensive buff that creates splash damage shockwave on attack. - Pomegranate Slice - Pomegranate Seeds - Pomegranate Custard - Pink Limeade - Crimson Carrot Roast - Deluxe Salad - Pomegranate Pork - Pomegranate Mutton - Pomegranate Chicken - Pomegranate Cake - Spicy Grenadine Jelly (requires Nether's Delight) - Glazed Strider (requires Nether's Delight)
Lime Bushes are found in Flower Forests and must be pollinated by a Bee to grow fruit.
Lime Foods Most foods in this category provide the Corrosion effect, a defensive buff providing an acid shield against projectiles. Incoming projectiles (besides special cases like Trident) will be dissolved by the acid. - Lime Slice - Candied Lime - Lime Cookie - Lime Popsicle - Key Lime Pie - Limeade - Berry Limeade - Potato Fritters - Honey Lime Chicken - Cod Ceviche - Mediterranean Salmon - Salmon Tartare - Lime Cake
Portobellos are found in small patches in Meadows. To grow into a colony, plant it somewhere dark in Rich Soil.
Portobello Foods - Baked Portobello Cap - Stuffed Portobello - Portobello Risotto - Portoburger - Portobello Quiche - Wild Rice Soup - Mushroom Pasta - Veggie Wrap
To bring our flavors in line with Neapolitan, we provide an Ice Cream, Ice Cream Block, and Milkshake for each of them.
Neapolitan Compat - Lime Ice Cream - Lime Ice Cream Block - Lime Milkshake - Pomegranate Ice Cream - Pomegranate Ice Cream Block - Pomegranate Milkshake
